and Engineering at Keshav Memorial Institute of Technology (An Autonomous Institution) Narayanaguda, affiliated to the Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad,

To provide a learning environment that inculcates problem solving skills, professional, ethical responsibilities, lifelong learning through multi modal platforms and prepares students to become successful professionals.
To establish an industry institute Interaction to make students ready for the
To promote research-based projects/activities in the emerging areas of technology convergence.
but also to create new enterprises.
To induce a spirit of nationalism which will enable the student to develop, understand India's challenges and to encourage them to develop effective
To support the faculty to accelerate their learning curve to deliver excellent service to students.

To be among the region's premier teaching and research Computer Science and Engineering departments producing globally competent and socially responsible graduates in the most conducive academic environment.
To provide faculty with state of the art facilities for continuous professional development and research, both in foundational aspects and of relevance to emerging computing trends.
To impart skills that transform students to develop technical solutions for societal needs and inculcate entrepreneurial talents.
To inculcate an ability in students to pursue the advancement of knowledge in various specializations of Computer Science and Engineering and make them industry-ready.
resources for research activities for seamless transfer of knowledge resulting in sponsored projects and
To cultivate responsibility through sharing of knowledge and innovative computing solutions that benefit the society-at-large.
To collaborate with academia, industry and community to set high standards in academic excellence and in fulfilling societal responsibilities
Apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals, and an engineering specialization to the solution of complex engineering problems.

Identify formulate, review research literature, and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions using first principles of mathematics, natural sciences, and engineering sciences
Design solutions for complex engineering problems
with appropriate consideration for the public health and safety, and the cultural, societal, and environmental considerations.
PO4. Conduct Investigations of Complex problems:
Use research-based knowledge and research methods including design of experiments, analysis and interpretation of data, and synthesis of the information to provide valid conclusions.

Create select, and, apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools including prediction and modeling to complex engineering activities with an understanding of the limitations.
Apply reasoning informed by contextual knowledge to societal, health, safety. Legal und cultural issues and the consequent responsibilities relevant to professional engineering practice.
Understand the impact of the professional engineering solutions in societal and environmental contexts and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development.
Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the engineering practice.
Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse teams and in multidisciplinary settings.

Communicate effectively on complex engineering activities with the engineering community and with society at large, such as, being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and receive clear instructions.
understanding of the engineering and management principles and apply these to one's own work, as a member
Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the broadest context of technological change.
An ability to analyze the common business functions to design and develop appropriate Information Technology solutions for social upliftments.
Shall have expertise on the evolving technologies like Python, Machine Learning,
Networks, Cyber Security, Mobile Apps, CRM, ERP, Big Data, etc.
create enthusiasts to pursue advance education supplementing their career growth.
innovative ideas by applying their computer engineering principles.
Graduates will develop necessary skillset for industry by imparting state of art technology in various areas of computer science engineering.
collaboratively exhibiting high level of professionalism.

modulation analysis to understand user mood effectively.

user well-being with societal and ethical considerations.

Director for facilitating all the amenities required for carrying out this project.

the Department for providing us with time to make this project a success within the given schedule.
guidance and encouragement given to us throughout the project work.

comprehensive web-based mental health application designed to enhance emotional well-being through intelligent, interactive, and personalized support systems. Developed using React for the frontend and Flask for backend services, the platform integrates multiple wellness tools such as mood tracking, guided meditation, breathing
The application uses advanced emotion-recognition technologies, including an LSTM-based
users’ real-time emotional states. A dynamic mental level testing module generates adaptive

yoga guidance, and a stress-relief Bubble Pop game further improve engagement and support healthy habits. Overall, this system delivers a holistic, adaptive, and accessible environment that helps users understand their emotions, build resilience, and improve overall mental well-being.
Mental Health, Emotion Detection, LSTM, Voice Modulation Analysis, Mood Tracking, Wellness Application, AI Chat Support, Web Application, Yoga Guidance,
that helps users understand, track, and improve their emotional well-being. The platform combines
AI-driven technologies to offer personalized guidance, emotional support, and real-time mental state analysis. By integrating mood tracking, meditation, yoga,
to deliver a holistic environment that promotes mental stability, resilience, and positive behavioral
and emotional support, leading to inconsistent usage.
AI features with traditional mental health tools. Key components include:
tools to complement traditional care because they can improve accessibility and deliver structured self-help
especially when they are evidence-based and personalized.
Systematic reviews of smartphone and web apps indicate positive outcomes for anxiety, depression and specific
supportive conversations. Randomized and quasi-experimental studies suggest chatbots can reduce symptoms in
approaches that combine convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for spatial feature extraction with recurrent
architectures (LSTM) for temporal modelling of frame sequences (CNN–LSTM) have shown improved accuracy
studies report competitive performance with attention or bidirectional LSTM enhancements.
CNN–LSTM, attention-based models). Reviews show SER can discriminate emotional states and has been
successfully applied to screen for mood disorders
in controlled studies; however, speaker variability, language/accent differences, and noisy environments remain key challenges. Recent mental-health–focused
behaviour logs) for more reliable emotion/mood inference than single-modality systems.
complete requirements of a software system. It clearly describes the purpose, functionalities, constraints,
before development begins. It acts as a blueprint that guides the entire software development lifecycle.
the structure, design, and behavior of
functional and interactive application. This chapter explains how the Mental Health Support System was built using React, Node.js, Flask, and
AI models, and how emotional-aware chatbot functionality was
sentiment analysis. The implementation also covers dashboard integration, backend logic, and
This step involves preparing the development environment, installing required dependencies, and establishing
using frontend, backend, and AI services.
Software testing is a crucial phase in the development lifecycle used to evaluate the functionality, reliability, usability,
user experience. Testing helps identify defects early, improves system reliability, and ensures stability before
Intelligence with healthcare and well-being support systems. Traditional mental health solutions often lack
providing an intelligent, user-centered platform that adapts to individual emotional and psychological needs.
The integration of features like mood tracking, meditation,
breathing exercises, gratitude journaling, and AI-based chatbot support creates a holistic ecosystem for mental wellness.

The use of modern web technologies such as React and Flask ensures a scalable, responsive, and efficient platform. The system architecture enables seamless interaction between user inputs, AI processing,
application emphasizes data privacy and ethical handling of sensitive user information, which is critical in mental health systems.

By offering tailored recommendations, emotional support, and progress tracking, the system empowers users to take control of their mental well-being. It serves not only as a support tool but also as a
deployment. As technology evolves, such systems can play a vital role in making mental health support more accessible, proactive, and effective.
